title: pinus pinaster subsp. acutisquama
intro: Pinus pinaster subsp. acutisquama is a subspecies of maritime pine native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pinus pinaster subsp. acutisquama include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
